summary: No-ship: one hook/open race variant remains when a sid-less branch row already exists for the cwd.

findings.title: Locked hook write can still duplicate a Claude session id over an existing branch row
findings.recommendation: In setSessionStatus, when opts.claudeSessionId is present, re-scan the latest state for that id before mutating any branch-keyed session, even when project.sessions[branch] already exists. Add a regression seeded with sessions.main for the cwd, then race openSessionByClaudeId and applyHookEvent for the same sid/cwd; assert only one record carries that sid.
